title: ResearchOutput
description: Structured return from research-agent (and deep-research iterations).

doc_path.description: Absolute path to the produced research-report.md (or deep-research-report-N.md).

options.description: Top 3-5 design options the user should choose between.

open_issues.description: Issues, flaws, or ambiguities that warrant another deep-research pass. Empty when settled.

iteration.description: 1 for the initial pass; 2, 3, ... for deep-research iterations.
